option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="32dp" android:height="32dp" android:viewportWidth="32" android:viewportHeight="32">
<!-- Shadow --> <path android:fillColor="#40000000" android:pathData="M16,3C11.03,3 7,7.03 7,12c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Main pin body - Blue for coastal --> <path android:fillColor="#2196F3" android:pathData="M16,2C11.03,2 7,6.03 7,11c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Inner circle background --> <path android:fillColor="#E3F2FD" android:pathData="M16,6.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,15.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,6.5 Z"/>
<!-- Coastal icon - waves and sun --> <!-- Sun --> <path android:fillColor="#FFC107" android:pathData="M18,8.5 A1.5,1.5 0 1,1 15,8.5 A1.5,1.5 0 1,1 18,8.5 Z"/>
<!-- Waves --> <path android:fillColor="#1976D2" android:pathData="M13,11.5 Q14,11 15,11.5 Q16,12 17,11.5 Q18,11 19,11.5 L19,12.5 Q18,12 17,12.5 Q16,13 15,12.5 Q14,12 13,12.5 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#42A5F5" android:pathData="M13,13 Q14,12.5 15,13 Q16,13.5 17,13 Q18,12.5 19,13 L19,14 Q18,13.5 17,14 Q16,14.5 15,14 Q14,13.5 13,14 Z"/>
</vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="32dp" android:height="32dp" android:viewportWidth="32" android:viewportHeight="32">
<!-- Shadow --> <path android:fillColor="#40000000" android:pathData="M16,3C11.03,3 7,7.03 7,12c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Main pin body - Blue for coastal --> <path android:fillColor="#2196F3" android:pathData="M16,2C11.03,2 7,6.03 7,11c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Inner circle background --> <path android:fillColor="#E3F2FD" android:pathData="M16,6.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,15.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,6.5 Z"/>
<!-- Coastal icon - waves and sun --> <!-- Sun --> <path android:fillColor="#FFC107" android:pathData="M18,8.5 A1.5,1.5 0 1,1 15,8.5 A1.5,1.5 0 1,1 18,8.5 Z"/>
<!-- Waves --> <path android:fillColor="#1976D2" android:pathData="M13,11.5 Q14,11 15,11.5 Q16,12 17,11.5 Q18,11 19,11.5 L19,12.5 Q18,12 17,12.5 Q16,13 15,12.5 Q14,12 13,12.5 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#42A5F5" android:pathData="M13,13 Q14,12.5 15,13 Q16,13.5 17,13 Q18,12.5 19,13 L19,14 Q18,13.5 17,14 Q16,14.5 15,14 Q14,13.5 13,14 Z"/>
</vector>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="32dp" android:height="32dp" android:viewportWidth="32" android:viewportHeight="32">
<!-- Shadow --> <path android:fillColor="#40000000" android:pathData="M16,3C11.03,3 7,7.03 7,12c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Main pin body - Brown/Gray for mountain --> <path android:fillColor="#795548" android:pathData="M16,2C11.03,2 7,6.03 7,11c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Inner circle background --> <path android:fillColor="#EFEBE9" android:pathData="M16,6.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,15.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,6.5 Z"/>
<!-- Mountain icon - three peaks --> <path android:fillColor="#5D4037" android:pathData="M16,8 L18,12 L14,12 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#6D4C41" android:pathData="M13,10 L15,13 L11,13 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#8D6E63" android:pathData="M18,10 L20,13 L16,13 Z"/>
<!-- Snow caps on peaks --> <path android:fillColor="#FFFFFF" android:pathData="M16,8 L16.8,9.2 L15.2,9.2 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#FFFFFF" android:pathData="M13,10 L13.6,10.8 L12.4,10.8 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#FFFFFF" android:pathData="M18,10 L18.6,10.8 L17.4,10.8 Z"/>
</vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="32dp" android:height="32dp" android:viewportWidth="32" android:viewportHeight="32">
<!-- Shadow --> <path android:fillColor="#40000000" android:pathData="M16,3C11.03,3 7,7.03 7,12c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Main pin body - Brown/Gray for mountain --> <path android:fillColor="#795548" android:pathData="M16,2C11.03,2 7,6.03 7,11c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Inner circle background --> <path android:fillColor="#EFEBE9" android:pathData="M16,6.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,15.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,6.5 Z"/>
<!-- Mountain icon - three peaks --> <path android:fillColor="#5D4037" android:pathData="M16,8 L18,12 L14,12 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#6D4C41" android:pathData="M13,10 L15,13 L11,13 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#8D6E63" android:pathData="M18,10 L20,13 L16,13 Z"/>
<!-- Snow caps on peaks --> <path android:fillColor="#FFFFFF" android:pathData="M16,8 L16.8,9.2 L15.2,9.2 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#FFFFFF" android:pathData="M13,10 L13.6,10.8 L12.4,10.8 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#FFFFFF" android:pathData="M18,10 L18.6,10.8 L17.4,10.8 Z"/>
</vector>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="32dp" android:height="32dp" android:viewportWidth="32" android:viewportHeight="32">
<!-- Shadow --> <path android:fillColor="#40000000" android:pathData="M16,3C11.03,3 7,7.03 7,12c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Main pin body - Gray for general town --> <path android:fillColor="#607D8B" android:pathData="M16,2C11.03,2 7,6.03 7,11c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Inner circle background --> <path android:fillColor="#ECEFF1" android:pathData="M16,6.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,15.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,6.5 Z"/>
<!-- Town icon - buildings --> <path android:fillColor="#455A64" android:pathData="M14,9 L14,14 L12,14 L12,9 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#546E7A" android:pathData="M16,8 L16,14 L14,14 L14,8 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#455A64" android:pathData="M18,10 L18,14 L16,14 L16,10 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#37474F" android:pathData="M20,11 L20,14 L18,14 L18,11 Z"/>
<!-- Windows on buildings --> <path android:fillColor="#90A4AE" android:pathData="M12.5,10 L13,10 L13,10.5 L12.5,10.5 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#90A4AE" android:pathData="M14.5,9.5 L15,9.5 L15,10 L14.5,10 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#90A4AE" android:pathData="M16.5,11 L17,11 L17,11.5 L16.5,11.5 Z"/>
</vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="32dp" android:height="32dp" android:viewportWidth="32" android:viewportHeight="32">
<!-- Shadow --> <path android:fillColor="#40000000" android:pathData="M16,3C11.03,3 7,7.03 7,12c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Main pin body - Gray for general town --> <path android:fillColor="#607D8B" android:pathData="M16,2C11.03,2 7,6.03 7,11c0,7 9,17 9,17s9,-10 9,-17c0,-4.97 -4.03,-9 -9,-9z"/>
<!-- Inner circle background --> <path android:fillColor="#ECEFF1" android:pathData="M16,6.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,15.5 A4.5,4.5 0 1,1 16,6.5 Z"/>
<!-- Town icon - buildings --> <path android:fillColor="#455A64" android:pathData="M14,9 L14,14 L12,14 L12,9 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#546E7A" android:pathData="M16,8 L16,14 L14,14 L14,8 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#455A64" android:pathData="M18,10 L18,14 L16,14 L16,10 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#37474F" android:pathData="M20,11 L20,14 L18,14 L18,11 Z"/>
<!-- Windows on buildings --> <path android:fillColor="#90A4AE" android:pathData="M12.5,10 L13,10 L13,10.5 L12.5,10.5 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#90A4AE" android:pathData="M14.5,9.5 L15,9.5 L15,10 L14.5,10 Z"/> <path android:fillColor="#90A4AE" android:pathData="M16.5,11 L17,11 L17,11.5 L16.5,11.5 Z"/>
</vector>
